summary: First full E2E test of SagaDrop. All 13 requested features working end-to-end. Backend: 12/12 tests pass (books, categories, newsletter, Claude recommend, Nano Banana cover). Frontend: hero 3D canvas renders, trending books load 8, add-to-cart opens drawer with correct subtotal, wishlist adds items and shows drawer with navbar badge, newsletter form submits and shows success, all 5 Collections tabs load books, AI Recommendation Studio calls Claude and renders summary + 4 picks, Book Customizer updates 3D preview on material/foil/font/addon change, price recalculates correctly (₹3,096 for Special Edition + all addons), AI cover generation via Nano Banana works and image is displayed on 3D preview, custom edition adds to cart.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 25: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY uses default empty string then raises 500 at runtime — fine, but consider fail-fast at startup for clearer ops feedback.
server.py has `import json`/`import re` inside the request handler (line 297-298). Move to module top for consistency.

server.py Book cover images depend on public Open Library CDN — network fragility risk in production; consider caching URLs or fallback images. Frontend already has onError fallback which mitigates this well.
Collections.jsx uses .replace(/[^a-z]+/g, '-') resulting in ids like 'editor-s-picks' — works but a bit awkward. Consider slugifying properly (drop leading/trailing hyphens).
BookCustomizer.jsx: unused imports 'motion' from framer-motion (line 2). Minor lint noise.
Newsletter.jsx: on submit failure, status resets to 'idle' silently — user gets no error toast. Consider adding toast.error for better UX.
server.py: /api/ai/recommend blocks in a single Claude call — no retry or fallback. For a demo it's fine; production should handle 502s gracefully.
CORS allow_origins reads from CORS_ORIGINS env (default '*') — OK for dev but should be tightened for prod.
seed_data_creation: Newsletter entry with TEST_newsletter@example.com and TEST_reader@example.com written to Mongo `newsletter` collection (upserted, safe to re-run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend at https://editorial-books.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend at /api. All 13 review features verified: hero 3D, trending 8 books, /api/books filter (category, collection), /api/categories (9), /api/newsletter, /api/ai/recommend (Claude Sonnet 4.5), /api/ai/generate-cover (Gemini 3.1 Nano Banana ~10s response), add-to-cart flow with cart drawer + subtotal, wishlist flow with drawer + badge, AI Studio mood/tone → 4 picks rendered, BookCustomizer material/foil/font/addon updates + AI cover on 3D preview + add to cart. Collections tabs data-testids use hyphenated slugs: editor-s-picks, new-releases, award-winners, collector-editions, limited-editions. Newsletter test email must avoid reserved TLDs (.test not allowed by EmailStr).
